zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir George Booth於1445年出生在英國藍卡爾巴頓時，他的父親Sir William Eccles Boothe Knight of Garter, Sheriff of Lancashire25歲，母親Matilda Dutton20歲。他於1461年與Catherine de Monfort在英國諾福爾可埃克爾斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1483年3月25日在英國英格蘭爾鄧翰 梅西享年38歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir George Booth于1445年出生在英国藍卡爾巴頓时，他的父亲Sir William Eccles Boothe Knight of Garter, Sheriff of Lancashire25岁，母亲Matilda Dutton20岁。他于1461年与Catherine de Monfort在英国諾福爾可埃克爾斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1483年3月25日在英国英格兰爾鄧翰 梅西享年38岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾。

nameMeanings.name: Booth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): topographic or occupational name from Middle English bothe (Old Danish bōth) ‘temporary shelter, such as a covered market stall or a cattle-herdsman's hut’. The latter sense was predominant in the Pennines of Lancashire and Yorkshire, where there were many cattle farms or vaccaries, and whose subdivisions were known as ‘booths’. The principal meaning of the surname there was therefore probably ‘cattle herdsman’, ‘man in charge of a vaccary’, and thus identical with Boothman . Elsewhere it may have denoted a shopkeeper who owned a temporary market stall, but no evidence has been found to confirm this use of the surname. In the British Isles the surname is still more common in northern England, where Scandinavian influence was more marked, and in Scotland, where the word was borrowed into Gaelic as both(an).
History: Robert Booth (1604–72) is mentioned in the colonial records of Exeter, NH, in 1645. He subsequently moved to ME.

variants.name: Boothman
meanings: English (northern): occupational name from Middle English both (Old Danish bōth) ‘temporary shelter, such as a covered market stall or a cattle-herdsman's hut’ + man. In the Pennine uplands of northern England, where booths were subdivisons of vaccaries or cattle-rearing establishment, the name probably denoted a herdsman who looked after cattle, perhaps a man in charge of a vaccary. Elsewhere the surname might have denoted a shopkeeper but evidence for this lacking. Alternatively, the name can also be an occupational name for a servant of a man surnamed Booth .

nameMeanings.name: George
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir George Booth was born in 1445, in Barton, Lancashire, England, his father, Sir William Eccles Boothe Knight of Garter, Sheriff of Lancashire, was 25 and his mother, Matilda Dutton, was 20. He married Catherine de Monfort in 1461, in Eccles, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 25 March 1483, in Dunham Massey, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 38, and was buried in Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir George Booth est né en 1445, à Barton, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Eccles Boothe Knight of Garter, Sheriff of Lancashire, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Matilda Dutton, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Catherine de Monfort en 1461, à Eccles, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 25 mars 1483, à Dunham Massey, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterré à Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir George Booth 1445 in Barton, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Eccles Boothe Knight of Garter, Sheriff of Lancashire 25 und seine Mutter Matilda Dutton 20. Er hat 1461 in Eccles, Norfolk, England Catherine de Monfort geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 25. März 1483 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Dunham Massey, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Lancashire, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir George Boothが1445年にイギリスランカシュアイアバートンで生まれた時，父Sir William Eccles Boothe Knight of Garter, Sheriff of Lancashireは25歳，母Matilda Duttonは20歳であった。1461年にイギリスノーフォルクエククレスでCatherine de Monfortと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1483年3月25日にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアダンハム マセイで38歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir George Booth(이)가 1445년 영국 랭카실르 바턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Eccles Boothe Knight of Garter, Sheriff of Lancashire(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda Dutton(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1461년 영국 노르폴크 치레스에서 Catherine de Monfort(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1483년 3월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 던함 마시에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir George Booth nasceu em 1445, em Barton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Eccles Boothe Knight of Garter, Sheriff of Lancashire, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Matilda Dutton, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Catherine de Monfort em 1461, em Eccles, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir George Booth родился в 1445 г. в местности бартон, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Eccles Boothe Knight of Garter, Sheriff of Lancashire было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda Dutton, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Catherine de Monfort в 1461 г. в местности экклесь, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Он умер 25 марта 1483 г. в местности дунам масси, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 38 лет и был похоронен в местности ланкашир, Англия.
